items.name_en: New Arrival 🌸M13263 Cherry. This Neverfull Medium handbag reinterprets the playful elements of the x Murakami Re-Imagined series with dynamic brushstrokes, placing the sweet cherry pattern on Monogram coated canvas, while the striking striped lining echoes the artist's signature color aesthetic. Calfskin trim completes the classic style. Detailed Features - 31* × 14 × 28cm.
items.name_cn: New Arrival 🌸M13263 Cherry. Calfskin trim completes the classic style. Detailed Features - 31* × 14 × 28cm.

items.name_en: New Arrival M14238 [Speedy Soft 30 Handbag] M14238 White Flower/Cherry. Encounter the unique aesthetics of the x Murakami Re-Imagined series. The Monogram coated canvas features a clean color palette to highlight the brilliant and passionate cherry pattern by the Japanese artist. The denim construction forms the inner layer, while the Toron top handle and detachable Toron shoulder strap are crafted from leather, and the bow-shaped key case adds rich details. Detailed Features - 17 x 30 x 21 cm.

The denim construction forms the inner layer, while the Toron top handle and detachable Toron shoulder strap are crafted from leather, and the bow-shaped key case adds rich details. items.name_en: New Arrival M14231 [Lx TM Pochette Métis East West Handbag] M14231 Cherry. This Pochette Métis East West handbag is from the x Murakami Re-Imagined series, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas in soft new-season tones that complement the sweet cherry pattern in the artist's work. The glossy S-lock buckle lights up the overall design, and the exquisite structure features multiple compartments, making it an elegant choice for daily travel. Detailed Features - 13.5 x 6 x 21.5 cm

items.name_en: Premium 163c01 Dynamic Chip. This Speedy Bandoulière 25 handbag draws inspiration from the Express bag launched by the brand in 1930, featuring a delicate structure crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather, cleverly using a deep background to highlight the large Monogram embossed pattern. Dazzling metalware and bright linings highlight exquisite details, with a top handle and a detachable and adjustable strap. Model: M58947. Leather: Italian Grade A leather. Hardware: Imported Grade A all-steel hardware. Packaging: Full set of original MB packaging. Dimensions: 25.0 x 19.0 x 15.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Premium 163c01 Dynamic Chip. This Speedy series is from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami Re-edition series, cleverly incorporating the bright tones of the Japanese artist into the Monogram coated canvas. Calfskin trim outlines the close-fitting structure, and the nameplate is embellished with an elegant bow detail. Model: M13085. Leather: Italian Grade A leather. Hardware: Imported Grade A all-steel hardware. Packaging: Full set of original MB packaging. Dimensions: 25.0 x 19.0 x 15.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: M13094 Monogram Cherry Blossom. This Speedy Bandouliere handbag features classic Monogram coated canvas, illuminated by the sweet cherry blossom pattern from the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series. Crafted with refined leather, it includes a Toron top handle, a detachable shoulder strap, and a Murakami key pouch. The compact size easily accommodates daily essentials like a phone and long wallet. Dimensions: 20.5*12*13cm.

items.name_en: M14239 White Flower Cherry Blossom (M81911). This Wallet On Chain Ivy handbag continues the narrative of the 2000s, playfully joining the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series. The Monogram canvas subtly highlights the vibrant colors of the cherry pattern, fully releasing the artist's kawaii power. Leather shoulder strap and chain allow for shoulder carrying. Dimensions: 23.5*4.3*12cm.
